predicate CanDistribute(a: int, b: int, c: int, n: int)\n  requires n >= 0\n{\n  exists A: int, B: int, C: int\n    :: ValidDistribution(a, b, c, n, A, B, C)\n}\n\nmethod CollectingCoins(a: int, b:
